locations.name: Whispering Library
locations.description: A small hidden library where books sigh when opened.

nodes.summary: A book that only opens under moonlight
nodes.detail: The title is blank until midnight.
Requires dryer lint and a copper token.

connections.reason: book is located in Whispering Library
keeper knows fragments of the ritual

artifacts.name: Memory Quill
artifacts.description: A feather that records the last line read.

text: The Whispering Library hides a book that only reveals itself under moonlight. The Keeper Rhys will be helpful but guarded; use social skill checks to learn the ritual fragments. Scenes: Lower stacks at midnight—expect whispers and moving shelves. GM Advice: Prepare a clue chain linking the quill, the ritual, and the library's secret entrance.
